description: Drive the Hayward OmniLogic pool/spa cloud API: telemetry, control, schedule diffs, multi-site sweeps, and historical chemistry from a local store.

tools.name: alarms_list
tools.description: List active alarms for a site or every site. Optional: msp_system_id. Returns array of Alarm.

params.name: msp_system_id
params.description: Site MspSystemID. Omit to sweep every site.

tools.name: chemistry_get
tools.description: Current chemistry snapshot: pH, ORP, salt, water temp, with safe-range verdict. Optional: msp_system_id. Returns the new Chemistry.

params.name: msp_system_id
params.description: Site MspSystemID. Omit to use the only registered site.

tools.name: chlorinator_set_params
tools.description: Set chlorinator config (op mode, timed percent, ORP timeout, etc). Defaults to current MSP values for any flag you don't pass. Optional: op_mode, timed_pct, cell_type (plus 2 more). Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: op_mode
params.description: Operating mode: timed | orp-autosense | disabled.

params.name: timed_pct
params.description: Timed-mode chlorination percent (0-100).

params.name: cell_type
params.description: Cell type: T-3 | T-5 | T-9 | T-15. Defaults to the value in MSP config.

params.name: sc_timeout
params.description: Superchlorinate timeout in hours (1-96).

params.name: orp_timeout
params.description: ORP timeout in hours (1-96).

tools.name: config_get
tools.description: Fetch the equipment inventory for one site — pumps, heaters, chlorinator, lights, valves, relays, sensors. Optional: msp_system_id. Returns the new MspConfig.

params.name: msp_system_id
params.description: Site MspSystemID. Omit to use the only registered site, or the first site if multiple exist.

tools.name: equipment_off
tools.description: Turn an equipment item off. Required: name. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: name
params.description: Equipment name. Use 'config get' to list them.

tools.name: equipment_on
tools.description: Turn an equipment item on. Use --for to run for a bounded duration; otherwise stays on until you turn it off. Required: name. Optional: for. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: name
params.description: Equipment name (relay, valve, accessory pump, light). Use 'config get' to list them.

params.name: for
params.description: Duration to run, e.g. 1h, 30m, 2h30m. Omit to run indefinitely.

tools.name: heater_disable
tools.description: Turn a heater off. Required: heater_name. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: heater_name
params.description: Heater name. Use 'config get' to list them.

tools.name: heater_enable
tools.description: Turn a heater on. Heater stays on until set-temp is reached or you disable it. Required: heater_name. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: heater_name
params.description: Heater name from the MSP config (e.g. 'Pool Heater', 'Spa Heater'). Use 'config get' to list them.

tools.name: heater_set_temp
tools.description: Set a heater's target setpoint in degrees Fahrenheit. Required: heater_name, temp. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: heater_name
params.description: Heater name. Use 'config get' to list them.

params.name: temp
params.description: Target temperature in °F. Must fall within the heater's Min-Settable / Max-Settable range from MSP config.

tools.name: light_list_shows
tools.description: List every available ColorLogic show with its numeric ID and human-readable name. Returns array of LightShow.

tools.name: light_show
tools.description: Activate a ColorLogic show. V2 lights also accept --speed and --brightness. Required: show. Optional: light_name, speed, brightness. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: show
params.description: Show name (case-insensitive) or numeric ID. Use 'light list-shows' to enumerate.

params.name: light_name
params.description: Light name. Omit to apply to all ColorLogic lights at the site.

params.name: speed
params.description: (V2 only) Show speed 0-8.

params.name: brightness
params.description: (V2 only) Brightness 0-100.

tools.name: pump_set_speed
tools.description: Set a pump's running speed in RPM or percent (range comes from the pump's MSP config). Required: pump_name, speed. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: pump_name
params.description: Pump name. Use 'config get' to list them.

params.name: speed
params.description: Speed value (RPM for high-speed pumps, percent for VSPs).

tools.name: sites_list
tools.description: List every site registered under your Hayward account. Returns array of Site.

tools.name: spillover_set
tools.description: Set spillover speed and optional run duration. Required: speed. Optional: for. Returns the new CommandResult.

params.name: speed
params.description: Spillover speed percent.

params.name: for
params.description: Duration to run, e.g. 2h. Omit to run indefinitely.

tools.name: superchlor_off
tools.description: Stop a running superchlorination cycle early on the salt chlorinator. Normal chlorinator setpoint resumes once the boost is canceled. Returns the new CommandResult.

tools.name: superchlor_on
tools.description: Start superchlorination on the body-of-water's salt chlorinator. Runs until the configured SCTimeout expires or you turn it off. Returns the new CommandResult.

tools.name: telemetry_get
tools.description: Snapshot live state: chemistry (pH/ORP/salt), water and air temperature, pump speeds, heater enable, light state, alarm flags. Append-only-stored in telemetry_samples. Optional: msp_system_id. Returns the new Telemetry.

params.name: msp_system_id
params.description: Site MspSystemID. Omit to use the only registered site.
